(OP)1. To recommend that the 57th Directing Council adopt a resolution along the
ASSESSED CONTRIBUTIONS OF THE MEMBER STATES, PARTICIPATING
STATES, AND ASSOCIATE MEMBERS OF THE PAN AMERICAN HEALTH
(PP1) Whereas in Resolution CD57.R__ the Directing Council approved the
Program Budget of the Pan American Health Organization 2020–2021 (Official
(PP2) Bearing in mind that the Directing Council, in Resolution CD57.R__,
adopted the Scale of Assessed Contributions for 2020–2021 for Member States,
Participating States, and Associate Members of the Pan American Health Organization
(OP)1. To establish the assessed contributions of the Member States, Participating States,
and Associate Members of PAHO for the financial periods 2020 and 2021 in accordance
with the scale of assessed contributions shown below and in the corresponding amounts,
which represent an increase of __%1 with respect to the biennium 2018-2019.
1 The Pan American Sanitary Bureau presents for the Executive Committee’s consideration three scenarios
for determining the level of assessed contributions: scenario 1: no increase; scenario 2: 3% increase; and
scenario 3: 6% increase. Accordingly, this proposed resolution contains three tables showing the assessed
contributions for each of the three scenarios. The final resolution will present only one table showing the
assessed contributions pertaining to the scenario approved by the Executive Committee.
Scenario 1: Zero growth in Assessed Contributions
